public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as liaison.
manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a liaison still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of liaison in and around Nomdara Bond Registry Ring, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara Bond Registry Ring workable through the obligations of liaison while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Nomdara Bond Registry Ring, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of liaison visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Varek Waycord can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Varek Waycord will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Varek Waycord read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Bond Registry Ring: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
